stemHtml: During a flight lesson, an instructor asks a student pilot to increase the load factor. To do this, they should...

options.a: perform a level turn, as lift would be increased to maintain the altitude and in doing this the bank angle can control the load factor.
options.c: accelerate in straight and level flight as this would increase the lift and in doing so, increase the load factor.
options.d: decelerate in straight and level flight as this would increase the angle of attack and in doing so, increase the load factor.
